We look forward to serving the riders and businesses of Eldoret and the surrounding region.

Let’s settle this 
Which one is worse?

A. Heavy traffic
B. Bad roads

Identify genuine oil vs fake oil. Don’t be scammed. ⚠️

A genuine Honda oil seal has clean and clear printing, while fake oil seals often look rough, blurry, and poorly finished.

Protect your engine by choosing genuine Honda oil .

Learn more: https://hondamotorcyclekenya.com/pro-honda-oil/

Not all muddy roads are the same.

Some are soft and manageable… others are slippery underneath, especially after continuous rain.

If your bike starts sliding, don’t fight it suddenly. Ease off the throttle slightly and keep your movements smooth. Sharp reactions usually make it worse.

Control in mud is more about calm handling than force.

What’s the worst muddy road you’ve handled?

Every day, people wake up and hustle to support their families and keep the economy moving. Boda boda riders are a vital part of that story, carrying passengers and delivering goods everyday! Their work deserves respect. 

At Honda, we believe the people who keep going every day deserve motorcycles that do the same. That’s why Honda bikes are built for reliability and durability to support your livelihood, mile after mile.

Some days are smooth. Some days test your patience.

But every single day, you still show up.

Happy Labour Day to everyone who keeps going, even when it’s tough, especially the riders who spend hours on the road making sure others get where they need to be.

Your work supports families, builds communities, and keeps everything moving behind the scenes.

Take a moment today to appreciate how far you’ve come, and then keep moving forward.

You’re doing more than you think.

Something is on the way this Labour Month.

Stay tuned to find out!!

Long rides can be tiring, not just for you, but for your bike too.

Taking short breaks during long distances helps you stay alert and gives your bike time to cool down, especially on hot days. It also helps you stay focused and avoid fatigue, which is one of the biggest risks on long rides.

A few minutes of rest can make the rest of your journey much safer and smoother.

Servicing your bike once in a while helps.

Servicing it consistently? That’s what really keeps it running well over time.

When you stick to a routine, your bike performs better, feels smoother, and stays reliable day after day.

Consistency is what makes the difference.

👉 Visit a Honda dealer near you: https://hondamotorcyclekenya.com/dealers/

Kuna route moja unajua vizuri sana kuliko hata Google Maps 😅

This one hurts every time 😭

Ever noticed how your fuel disappears faster on some days than others, even when you’re doing the same routes? One thing many riders don’t realise is how much how you ride affects fuel consumption. Sudden acceleration, riding at very high RPMs for long, and constantly braking and accelerating in traffic all use more fuel than necessary. 

A simple trick? Try riding smoothly, accelerate gradually, maintain a steady speed where possible, and avoid unnecessary revving. You’ll be surprised how much longer your fuel lasts over time. Small change, but it adds up every day. 

#Honda #HondaMotorcycleKenya #FuelEfficiency  #MotorcycleTips #PowerofDreams #HowWeMoveYou

A new beginning, a fresh season, and a chance to reset. May this Easter bring you peace of mind, positive energy, and moments that remind you how far you’ve come.

Helmet si ya long distance pekee, even those short trips matter. One small mistake can change everything, so better to stay safe than sorry.

Ride safe this Easter Weekend 🙏

No rider plans for an accident.

But being prepared makes all the difference. Having valid motorcycle insurance protects you financially in case of accidents, damage, or injury. It also shows professionalism especially for boda boda riders who carry passengers daily.

Insurance gives you peace of mind. It protects your income. And most importantly, it protects lives.

Skill is important.
Experience is important.
But protection is essential.

Ride safe. Ride insured.

#Honda #HondaMotorcycleKenya  #RideSafe #MotorcycleInsurance  #SafetyFirst #PowerOfDreams #HowWeMoveYou

“Ni hapa tu karibu.”
That’s what most riders say before skipping their gear.

But the truth is, most accidents happen close to home. Short trips can turn serious in seconds. A helmet, reflective jacket, and proper shoes aren’t for long distances only. They’re for every ride.

Your safety is more important than convenience.
Protect your head. Protect your body. Protect your hustle.

Ride smart. Ride safe.

#Honda #HondaMotorcycleKenya #RideSafe #KenyaRiders #SafetyFirst #PowerOfDreams #HowWeMoveYou

A well-maintained motorcycle is a safe and reliable motorcycle.
Servicing your Honda every 4,000 km helps detect issues early, prevents wear and tear, and keeps your engine performing at its best.
Skipping maintenance may lead to engine damage, poor fuel efficiency, or unexpected breakdowns, all of which end up costing more in the long run.
Make preventive care a habit. Our authorized Honda dealers are ready to serve you.

📞 Call: 0701 876 860

#Honda #HondaMotorcycleKenya #ThePowerofDreams #HowWeMoveYou

Motorcycles rarely fail suddenly. They give warnings, we just ignore them.

If your bike feels or sounds different, that’s usually the best time to service it. Early attention prevents bigger damage, longer downtime, and higher repair costs.

Listening to your bike is part of smart riding.

#Honda #HondaMotorcycleKenya #MotorcycleCare #RideSmart #PowerOfDreams #HowWeMoveYou

If you have any questions or experience any challenges, you can also reach out to us directly via call or Whatsapp on 0701876860.

Your motorcycle logbook is more than just a document, it is proof that the bike legally belongs to you.

When the logbook is transferred to your name, you are fully compliant with NTSA requirements and protected in case of any ownership disputes. It also makes future processes like resale, insurance, or official checks much easier and stress-free.

If you purchased your Honda motorcycle through an authorized dealer, your logbook may already be available at the dealership where you bought the bike.

We encourage you to visit your dealer to collect your logbook.

#HondaMotorcycleKenya #NTSA #Logbook #RideWithConfidence #PowerofDreams #HowWeMoveYou
